timing_patterns.description: Critical adjustments made in final days of financial year

timing_patterns.significance: Suggests deliberate timing to avoid scrutiny

financial_anomalies.description: Multiple entities reallocate admin fees to production costs simultaneously

financial_anomalies.implication: Coordinated effort to obscure true cost structures
financial_anomalies.investigation_lead: Examine who authorized these simultaneous adjustments
